name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants can be in states: Init, Prepared, Committed, Aborted *)
Init == /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> Init]
        /\ coordinator = Init
        /\ messages = <<>>

Prepare == /\ coordinator = Init
           /\ messages = <<>>
           /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = Init
           /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = Prepared]
           /\ coordinator' = Init
           /\ messages' = Append(messages, Prepare)

VoteYes == /\ coordinator = Init
           /\ messages = <<>>
           /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = Prepared
           /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = Committed]
           /\ coordinator' = Init
           /\ messages' = Append(messages, Commit)

VoteNo == /\ coordinator = Init
           /\ messages = <<>>
           /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = Prepared
           /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = Aborted]
           /\ coordinator' = Init
           /\ messages' = Append(messages, Abort)

Commit == /\ coordinator = Init
           /\ messages = <<>>
           /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = Committed
           /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = Committed]
           /\ coordinator' = Init
           /\ messages' = Append(messages, Commit)

Abort == /\ coordinator = Init
           /\ messages = <<>>
           /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = Aborted
           /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = Aborted]
           /\ coordinator' = Init
           /\ messages' = Append(messages, Abort)

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* States: states[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init ==
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ states[i] = "hungry"
       /\ forks[i] = i
       /\ forks[%(i, N)+1] = i
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N)+1] = i]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ states[i] = "eating"
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N)+1] = i]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ states[i] = "thinking"
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
       /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue *)
Enqueue == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, tail)
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: dequeue *)
Dequeue == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<q, tail>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Enqueue \/ Dequeue

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
        /\ votedFor \in {None} \/ [ServerId]
        /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
       /\ votedFor = None
       /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = None
          /\ state' = "Candidate"
       \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Channels

VARIABLES state, channel, marker, finished

(* State of each process: 0=unrecorded, 1=recorded *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]
        /\ marker = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
        /\ finished = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Sending a marker on channel c *)
SendMarker(c) == /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Append(channel[c], "marker")]
                 /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<state, finished>>

(* Receiving a marker on channel c *)
ReceiveMarker(c) == /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(channel[c])]
                 /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![c] = FALSE]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<state, finished>>

(* Recording state of process i *)
RecordState(i) == /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
                 /\ finished' = [finished EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>

(* Sending a normal message on channel c *)
SendMessage(c, msg) == /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Append(channel[c], msg)]
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker, finished>>

(* Receiving a normal message on channel c *)
ReceiveMessage(c) == /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(channel[c])]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker, finished>>

Next == \/ \E c \in Channels : /\ channel[c] != <<>> /\ marker[c] = FALSE
                    /\ ReceiveMessage(c)
                \/ \E c \in Channels : /\ channel[c] != <<>> /\ marker[c] = TRUE
                    /\ ReceiveMarker(c)
                \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ state[i] = 0
                    /\ RecordState(i)
                \/ \E c \in Channels : /\ state[Source(c)] = 1 /\ marker[c] = FALSE
                    /\ SendMarker(c)
                \/ \E c \in Channels : /\ channel[c] != <<>> /\ marker[c] = FALSE
                    /\ SendMessage(c, "msg")

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {0,1}]
          /\ channel \in [Channels -> Seq(STRING)]
          /\ marker \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ finished \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker, finished>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLE token

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store, pending

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
        /\ pending \in [Keys -> [value: Values, client: [clientId: Int, opId: Int]]]

Init == /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]
        /\ pending = [k \in Keys |-> [value |-> NULL, client |-> [clientId: 0, opId: 0]]]

Put(k, v, client) == /\ k \in Keys
                    /\ v \in Values
                    /\ client \in [clientId: Int, opId: Int]
                    /\ pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![k] = [value: v, client: client]]
                    /\ store' = store

Get(k, client) == /\ k \in Keys
                  /\ client \in [clientId: Int, opId: Int]
                  /\ pending' = pending
                  /\ store' = store

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : \E client \in [clientId : Int, opId: Int] :
          Put(k, v, client)
        \/ \E k \in Keys : \E client \in [clientId : Int, opId: Int] :
          Get(k, client)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store, pending>>

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, NULL

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK ==
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Int, value: V]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Int, value: V]]
  /\ chosen \in V

Init ==
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = NULL

Prepare(j) ==
  /\ proposers[j].ballot' = proposers[j].ballot + 1
  /\ proposers[j].value' = proposers[j].value
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(j) ==
  /\ proposers[j].ballot' = proposers[j].ballot
  /\ proposers[j].value' = proposers[j].value
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> proposers[j].ballot,
                                   value |-> proposers[j].value]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Chosen(v) ==
  /\ chosen' = v
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> acceptors[i].ballot,
                                   value |-> v]]
  /\ proposers' = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> proposers[j].ballot,
                                   value |-> v]]

Next ==
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Prepare(j)
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Accept(j)
  \/ \E v \in V : Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries
VARIABLES state, seqNum, retries, sentChunks, ackedChunks, lostMessages

Init ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ seqNum = 1
    /\ retries = 0
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ lostMessages = {}

SendChunk ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ seqNum <= Len(File) \div ChunkSize
    /\ state' = "sending"
    /\ seqNum' = seqNum
    /\ retries' = 0
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostMessages' = lostMessages

Transmit ==
    /\ state = "sending"
    /\ state' = "waiting_ack"
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \union {seqNum}
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostMessages' = lostMessages
    /\ retries' = retries

ReceiveAck ==
    /\ state = "waiting_ack"
    /\ seqNum \in ackedChunks
    /\ state' = "idle"
    /\ seqNum' = seqNum + 1
    /\ retries' = 0
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostMessages' = lostMessages

Timeout ==
    /\ state = "waiting_ack"
    /\ seqNum \notin ackedChunks
    /\ retries < MaxRetries
    /\ state' = "sending"
    /\ retries' = retries + 1
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostMessages' = lostMessages

GiveUp ==
    /\ state = "waiting_ack"
    /\ seqNum \notin ackedChunks
    /\ retries = MaxRetries
    /\ state' = "failed"
    /\ seqNum' = seqNum
    /\ retries' = retries
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostMessages' = lostMessages

Done ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ seqNum > Len(File) \div ChunkSize
    /\ state' = "done"
    /\ seqNum' = seqNum
    /\ retries' = retries
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostMessages' = lostMessages

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ Transmit
    \/ ReceiveAck
    \/ Timeout
    \/ GiveUp
    \/ Done

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, seqNum, retries, sentChunks, ackedChunks, lostMessages>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + 1]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + 1]
        \/ /\ offsets' = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
          /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> (clocks[i] + offsets[i]) \div N]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLE flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = {}

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = infected
      /\ \E i \in 1..Len(known) :
            /\ known[i] \in infected
            /\ \E j \in 1..Len(known) :
                  /\ ~(known[j] \in infected)
                  /\ infected' = infected \cup {known[j]}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free # {}
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        \/ /\ free' = free
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
         /\ allocated \in [Client -> SUBSET Pages]
         /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
         /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq free'

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES subscribers, messages

Init ==
  /\ subscribers = <<>>
  /\ messages = <<>>

Next ==
  \/ /\ \E topic, subscriber \in DOMAIN subscribers :
        /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(subscribers[topic], subscriber)]
        /\ messages' = messages
  \/ /\ \E topic, message \in DOMAIN messages :
        /\ subscribers' = subscribers
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(messages[topic], message)]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [x \in {1,2} |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ wants[2] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants
  \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ wants[2] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = 1
